category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083 medical-protective) to Vietnam market (TCVN voluntary standards, QCVN national technical regulations with CR conformity mark, MOLISA occupational-safety framework; medical masks under the Ministry of Health).

title.en: China-to-Vietnam PPE Respirator (Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入越南（TCVN / QCVN）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入越南（TCVN / QCVN）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Vietnam requirements under the TCVN voluntary standards and QCVN national technical regulations system, STAMEQ certification of conformity (CR mark), the MOLISA (Ministry of Labour, Invalids and Social Affairs) occupational-safety framework for industrial respiratory protection, the in-country importer obligation, and the boundary where medical masks fall under the Ministry of Health rather than the labour-safety route.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与越南要求对照，涵盖TCVN自愿性标准与QCVN国家技术法规体系、STAMEQ符合性认证（CR标志）、劳动荣军与社会事务部（MOLISA）的职业安全框架对工业呼吸防护的要求、境内进口商义务，以及医用口罩归属卫生部而非劳动安全路径的界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與越南要求對照，涵蓋TCVN自願性標準與QCVN國家技術法規體系、STAMEQ符合性認證（CR標誌）、勞動榮軍與社會事務部（MOLISA）的職業安全框架對工業呼吸防護的要求、境內進口商義務，以及醫用口罩歸屬衛生部而非勞動安全路徑的界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Vietnamese law, TCVN/QCVN standards, the scope of STAMEQ-designated certification bodies, MOLISA occupational-safety requirements, and the medical-vs-industrial mask boundary with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The industrial-respirator-vs-medical-mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行越南法律、TCVN/QCVN标准、STAMEQ指定认证机构的范围、MOLISA职业安全要求，以及工业呼吸器与医用口罩的界定。本文所述的工业呼吸器与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行越南法律、TCVN/QCVN標準、STAMEQ指定認證機構的範圍、MOLISA職業安全要求，以及工業呼吸器與醫用口罩的界定。本文所述的工業呼吸器與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Industrial filtering respirators entering Vietnam sit in the TCVN/QCVN framework: TCVN standards (e.g., the TCVN 8197 series adopting EN 149) are voluntary references, while QCVN national technical regulations are mandatory and, where applicable, enforced through a certification of conformity (chung nhan hop quy) bearing the CR mark issued by a STAMEQ-designated body, with MOLISA (Ministry of Labour) owning the occupational-safety regime for protective equipment used at work. A Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) test report is a useful technical basis but does not by itself constitute a Vietnamese certification of conformity, and an in-country importer of record is required. A critical boundary: medical/surgical masks are regulated by the Ministry of Health as medical devices, not through the labour-safety PPE route — the wrong classification triggers a completely different regulatory path.
answer_first.zh: 进入越南的工业过滤式呼吸器处于TCVN/QCVN框架内：TCVN标准（如采用EN 149的TCVN 8197系列）为自愿性参考，而QCVN国家技术法规为强制性，在适用情形下通过由STAMEQ指定机构签发、带CR标志的符合性认证（chung nhan hop quy）执行，劳动荣军与社会事务部（MOLISA，劳动部）主管工作场所防护装备的职业安全制度。中国GB 2626（KN95）检测报告是有用的技术依据，但其本身不构成越南符合性认证，且须有境内进口商作为责任主体。关键界定：医用/外科口罩由卫生部作为医疗器械监管，而非通过劳动安全PPE路径——错误分类将触发完全不同的监管路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入越南的工業過濾式呼吸器處於TCVN/QCVN框架內：TCVN標準（如採用EN 149的TCVN 8197系列）為自願性參考，而QCVN國家技術法規為強制性，在適用情形下通過由STAMEQ指定機構簽發、帶CR標誌的符合性認證（chung nhan hop quy）執行，勞動榮軍與社會事務部（MOLISA，勞動部）主管工作場所防護裝備的職業安全制度。中國GB 2626（KN95）檢測報告是有用的技術依據，但其本身不構成越南符合性認證，且須有境內進口商作為責任主體。關鍵界定：醫用/外科口罩由衛生部作為醫療器械監管，而非通過勞動安全PPE路徑——錯誤分類將觸發完全不同的監管路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
